programme.title: Eight Millimeter
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage is a private detective hired to investigate the source of a crudely shot eight millimeter film. The investigation sends him down a gritty and frightening path into society's darkest corners.

programme.title: Get Carter
programme.desc: A Las Vegas mob enforcer travels back to his hometown to investigate his brother's mysterious death.

programme.title: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: The fifth installment of the Underworld franchise.

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke and Uma Thurman star in this futuristic sci-fi thriller about a world where genetic engineering is used to perfect the human species.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: The team behind the global phenomenon The Da Vinci Code returns for the highly anticipated Angels & Demons, based upon the bestselling novel by Dan Brown. Tom Hanks reprises his role as Harvard symbologist Robert Langdon, who once again finds that forces with ancient roots are willing to stop at nothing, even murder, to advance their goals

programme.title: The Good Shepherd (2006)
programme.desc: The history of over 40 years in the CIA, told through the eyes of James Wilson, one of its founding officers

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a war waged in Mogadishu by the high tech Black Hawk helicopters and the US Army Rangers and Deltas.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: Deeply ensconced in a top-secret military program, three pilots struggle to bring an artificial intelligence program under control ... before it initiates the next world war.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: The Return
programme.desc: When the Universal Soldiers supercomputer goes haywire, Luc Deveraux is the only one who can battlethe elite team of deadly, near-perfect warriors.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Anaconda 3: Offspring
programme.desc: A ruthless mercenary, Hammett (David Hasselhoff) and his team are on the hunt for a pair of giant snakes that have escaped and are on a mega-sized feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Gothika
programme.desc: A criminal psychologist (Berry) awakens to find herself a patient in the institution where she works, with no memory of the murder she's accused of committing. As she tries to regain her memory - and her freedom - a vengeful spirit manipulates her.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, and the rest, who live on a ruined Earth.

programme.title: Anaconda 3: Offspring
programme.desc: A ruthless mercenary, Hammett (David Hasselhoff) and his team are on the hunt for a pair of giant snakes that have escaped and are on a mega-sized feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Gothika
programme.desc: A criminal psychologist (Berry) awakens to find herself a patient in the institution where she works, with no memory of the murder she's accused of committing. As she tries to regain her memory - and her freedom - a vengeful spirit manipulates her.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, and the rest, who live on a ruined Earth.

programme.title: District 9
programme.desc: From producer Peter Jackson and director Neill Blomkamp comes a startlingly original science-fiction thriller where alien refugees, stranded on Earth, are exiled to a slum on the fringes of Johannesburg.

programme.title: Insidious: The Last Key
programme.desc: Parapsychologist Dr. Elise Rainier faces her most fearsome and personal haunting yet - in her own family home.

programme.title: Don't Breathe
programme.desc: A trio of friends break into the house of a wealthy blind man, thinking theyll get away with the perfect heist. Theyre wrong.

programme.title: Flatliners (2017)
programme.desc: Med students stop their hearts to experience the afterlife.

programme.title: The Art Of The Steal
programme.desc: Renowned art thief and former daredevil Crunch Calhoun (Kurt Russell) teams up with a motley crew of international grifters to pull off the most elaborate double-crossing caper of a lifetime.

programme.title: Enough
programme.desc: Working-class waitress Slim (Jennifer Lopez -The Wedding Planner) thought she was entering a life of domestic bliss when she married Mitch (Billy Campbell - TV's "Once and Again"), the man of her dreams. After the arrival of their first child, her picture perfect life is shattered when she discovers Mitch's hidden possessive dark side, a controlling and abusive alter ego that can turn trust, loveand tranquility into terror.

programme.title: Secret Window
programme.desc: Superstar Johnny Depp gives one of the most captivating performances of his career in this grippingpsychological thriller.

programme.title: Tears of the Sun
programme.desc: After a West African president's family is assassinated and civil unrest is rampant, a top secret team is deployed to the far reaches of the jungle to rescue a U.S. doctor who is acting as a missionary. She insists the U.S. forces rescue all of her charges. As a result, the group falls under rebel attacks when it is revealed that the son of the deposed West African president is among those being saved.

programme.title: Ivanhoe (1982)
programme.desc: Sir Walter Scott's epic novel of timeless romance and knightly daring comes to life! The year is 1194. At long last, the noble knight Wilfred of Ivanhoe (Anthony Andrews) has returned from the Crusades to regain his title and win the hand of his beloved Lady Rowena (Lysette Anthony).

programme.title: The Mask of Zorro
programme.desc: A sweeping tale of love and honor, tragedy and triumph set against the Spanish conquest of Mexico, THE MASK OF ZORRO stars Anthony Hopkins and Antonio Banderas. After twenty years as the legendary Zorro, Don Diego (Hopkins) must transform a troubled drifter (Banderas) into the fearless hero he oncewas.

programme.title: The Legend Of Zorro (2005)
programme.desc: A threat to California's pending statehood causes Alejandro de la Vega to take action.

programme.title: Inferno (2016)
programme.desc: Robert Langdon follows clues to stop a virus that would wipe out half the world's population.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: As Nicole tries to reconcile with her long-missing mother, an investigation into a missing Justice Department undercover operative comes between Jess and Colin.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: The team's search for a recently paroled serial killer is complicated by a series of threats on Antonio's life.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Nicole heads for Chicago after her estranged foster sister's eight-year-old son is kidnapped.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: The kidnapping of twin girls causes Jess to have dreams which hint at the involvement of religion in the case.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: In the wake of Nicole's accident, the agents investigate the disappearance of a wealthy oil magnate's son.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A troubling secret underlies a college co-ed's disappearance during spring break in Myrtle Beach.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Suspecting a U.S. Senator of being responsible for a woman's disappearance, FBI Agent Brooke Haslett follows the trail to Indianapolis where she's paired with a young psychic capable of finding missing persons.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Despite all the evidence pointing to his guilt, Jess doesn't believe that the boyfriend of a missing FBI agent is responsible for her kidnapping.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Just when Brooke needs her to find a kidnap victim who is in danger of dying, Jess finds her ability to dream being blocked by a painful memory.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a married couple, Brooke finds that one of them may be a fugitive wanted for a deadly botched bank robbery twenty-five-years ago.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Jess is sent to North Carolina to help find a woman who disappeared from an aircraft seemingly in-flight.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: The death of a powerful Cleveland organized crime boss draws Jess into a potentially deadly search for the mobster's missing wife.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: The search for a bone marrow donor sends Brooke and Jess looking for a man who has disappeared from the witness protection program.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Brook leaves no stone unturned while investigating the disappearance of Eric's close friend, a former Russian mail order bride.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Trying to put the memories of his deadly mission to Point Blanc behind him, Alex takes a holiday on the Cornish coast. But when an old foe resurfaces, Alex finds himself dragged back into the world of spycraft.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Determined to track down Alan Blunt and warn him, Alex unknowingly puts himself on a collision course with the Department who are simultaneously hunting a dangerous cyber-terrorist. But are the two cases more related than either side realise?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex refuses to walk away from his investigation into the attack on Ed Pleasance, and with Sabina and Tom's help discovers a new lead connecting it to the Pentagon hack, putting him in the crosshairs of Smoking Mirror.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex must infiltrate a prestigious event if he's to learn more about the mysterious phenomenon that is the video game Feathered Serpent and its coming sequel, confronting the charismatic billionaire behind it, Damian Cray.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: To unlock the secrets of Feathered Serpent 2, Alex seeks expert assistance from an old friend. But with his own investigation spiraling out of control, how long before Blunt puts a stop to Alex's dangerous inference?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex, Tom and Kyra journey to Amsterdam, to infiltrate the heart of Damian Cray's operation, while the Department turn their scrutiny on Cray's forthcoming meeting with the President of the United States.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: To escape Amsterdam and deliver vital evidence to the Department, Alex needs Jack's help - putting her career in jeopardy. But with the US President's touchdown in the UK already underway, is Alex too late to stop Cray?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As Feathered Serpent 2 finally launches and the full scope of Cray's plan is revealed, Alex races against the clock to avert a catastrophic attack.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Robert Livingston takes a first pass at the Declaration of Independence; Rosa Parks settles in for an uncomfortable bus ride.

programme.title: The Rover
programme.desc: In the near future, mankind's greed and excesses have pushed civilization to the breaking point. Society is in decline, and the rule of law has disintegrated. Hardened drifter Eric (Guy Pearce) wanders across this dangerous and desolate landscape. When thieves steal Eric's car -- and only remaining possession -- they leave behind Rey (Robert Pattinson), a wounded comrade. Eric forces Rey to help him hunt down the gang in an unrelenting quest to take back the one thing that matters to him.

programme.desc: Guests are JD Vance, Raphael Warnock and Larry Wilmore.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Robert Livingston takes a first pass at the Declaration of Independence; Rosa Parks settles in for an uncomfortable bus ride.

programme.title: The Curse of La Llorona
programme.desc: In the 1970s Los Angeles, the legendary ghost La Llorona is stalking the night -- and the children. Ignoring the eerie warning of a troubled mother, a social worker and her own kids are drawn into a frightening supernatural realm. Their only hope of surviving La Llorona's deadly wrath is a disillusioned priest who practices mysticism to keep evil at bay.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Lord Rayden (Christopher Lambert) handpicks three martial artists -- federal agent Sonya Blade (Bridgette Wilson), Shaolin monk Liu Kang (Robin Shou) and action movie sensation Johnny Cage (Linden Ashby) -- and mentors them. After intense training, Rayden transports the trio to Outworld, the site of an interdimensional fighting tournament. There, the three humans must defeat the demonic warriors of the evil Shang Tsung (Cary-Hiroyuki Tagawa) -- or allow Tsung to take over the Earth.

programme.title: Deadpool 2
programme.desc: Wisecracking mercenary Deadpool meets Russell, an angry teenage mutant who lives at an orphanage. When Russell becomes the target of Cable -- a genetically enhanced soldier from the future -- Deadpool realizes that he'll need some help saving the boy from such a superior enemy. He soon joins forces with Bedlam, Shatterstar, Domino and other powerful mutants to protect young Russell from Cable and his advanced weaponry.

programme.title: The Substance
programme.desc: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

programme.title: Judy
programme.desc: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

programme.title: Prometheus
programme.desc: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin
programme.desc: After leaving London for the English countryside, writer A.A. Milne starts to spin fanciful yarns about his son's growing collection of stuffed animals. These stories form the basis for Winnie-the-Pooh and The House at Pooh Corner, published respectively in 1926 and 1928. Milne and his family soon become swept up in the instant success of the books, while the enchanting tales bring hope and comfort to the rest of postwar England.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Driven by her faith in Alicent, Rhaenyra positions herself to take King's Landing while the Triarchy sails to take on Corlys in the Gullet.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Cursed by a devious sorceress, China's ruthless Dragon Emperor (Jet Li) and his vast army lie buried in clay for millennia. When young archaeologist Alex O'Connell is tricked into reviving the emperor, he and his famous parents (Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello) must find a way to send the ghoul back to the grave before he can awaken his vast army and take over the world.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Bang My Box: The Robin Byrd Story
programme.desc: Explore the rise of a boundary-pushing, sex-positive, cable-access pioneer who became an accidental AIDS-era lifeline and First Amendment fighter; at 70, with 600 shows behind her, she considers her place in the history she created.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: Miss You, Love You
programme.desc: A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband's funeral with a total stranger: her estranged son's assistant.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

programme.title: Pillion
programme.desc: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.

programme.title: The Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ashley "Ash" Williams (Bruce Campbell), his girlfriend and three pals hike into the woods to a cabin for a fun night away. There they find an old book, the Necronomicon, whose text reawakens the dead when it's read aloud. The friends inadvertently release a flood of evil and must fight for their lives or become one of the evil dead. Ash watches his friends become possessed, and must make a difficult decision before daybreak to save his own life in this, the first of Sam Raimi's trilogy.

programme.title: Evil Dead II
programme.desc: The second of three films in the Evil Dead series is part horror, part comedy, with Ash Williams (Bruce Campbell) once again battling horrifying demons at a secluded cabin in the woods. After discovering an audiotape left by a college professor that contains voices reading from the Book of the Dead, Ash's girlfriend Linda (Denise Bixler) becomes possessed by evil spirits that are awakened by the voices on the tape. Ash soon discovers there is no escaping the woods.

programme.title: Evil Dead
programme.desc: Mia (Jane Levy), a drug addict, is determined to kick the habit. To that end, she asks her brother, David (Shiloh Fernandez), his girlfriend, Natalie (Elizabeth Blackmore) and their friends Olivia (Jessica Lucas) and Eric (Lou Taylor Pucci) to accompany her to their family's remote forest cabin to help her through withdrawal. Eric finds a mysterious Book of the Dead at the cabin and reads aloud from it, awakening an ancient demon. All hell breaks loose when the malevolent entity possesses Mia.

programme.title: Evil Dead Rise
programme.desc: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.title: How to Make a Killing
programme.desc: Disowned by his obscenely wealthy family, Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

programme.desc: Elle Woods (Reese Witherspoon) has it all. She wants nothing more than to be Mrs. Warner Huntington III. But there is one thing stopping him (Matthew Davis) from proposing: She is too blond. Elle rallies all of her resources and gets into Harvard, determined to win him back.

programme.desc: The host of a popular paranormal podcast is sent hidden messages within anonymous recordings, unleashing a demonic presence that is impossible to escape.

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Robert McCall (Denzel Washington), a man of mysterious origin who believes he has put the past behind him, dedicates himself to creating a quiet new life. However, when he meets Teri (Chloë Grace Moretz), a teenager who has been manhandled by violent Russian mobsters, he simply cannot walk away. With his set of formidable skills, McCall comes out of self-imposed retirement and emerges as an avenging angel, ready to take down anyone who brutalizes the helpless.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Robert McCall's mysterious past cuts especially close to home when thugs kill Susan Plummer, his best friend and former colleague. Now out for revenge, McCall must take on a crew of highly trained assassins who'll stop at nothing to destroy him.

programme.title: The Equalizer 3
programme.desc: Since giving up his life as a government assassin, Robert McCall finds solace in serving justice on behalf of the oppressed. Now living in Southern Italy, he soon discovers his new friends are under the control of local crime bosses. As events turn deadly, McCall becomes their protector by taking on the mafia.

When thieves steal Eric's car -- and only remaining possession -- they leave behind Rey (Robert Pattinson), a wounded comrade. Eric forces Rey to help him hunt down the gang in an unrelenting quest to take back the one thing that matters to him.

programme.title: The Hole in the Ground
programme.desc: One night, Sarah's young son disappears into the woods behind their rural home. When he returns, he looks the same, but his behavior grows increasingly disturbing. Sarah begins to believe that the boy who returned may not be her son at all.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Alicent risks everything to fulfill her end of the bargain; Rhaenyra must decide whether the Iron Throne is worth the cost.

programme.title: The Welcome Table
programme.desc: Investigation into the impact of the ecological disaster on everyday people's lives by looking at the intersection of climate and immigration.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister and her children, Celie faces many hardships in life, including an abusive husband. With support from a sultry singer named Shug Avery, as well as her stand-her-ground stepdaughter, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama want to honor America's 250th anniversary and celebrate the history of the nation on the occasion, but then Larry David calls.

programme.title: The Spectacular Now
programme.desc: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: On fourth of July, Robby meets his replacement for his sabbatical, a no-nonsense attending from the VA; a familiar face returns to the Pitt.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: Distracted by her impending deposition, King suffers a fall; Al-Hashimi attempts to revolutionize the department's technology; Javadi sizes up the competition.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: After a motorcycle collision, a husband and wife are rushed to the ER; as King and Javadi deal with a bickering family, Santos is forced to check her assumptions about a possible case of child abuse; Robby bonds with a Tree of Life survivor.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: With a nearby hospital shuttered on the busiest day of the year, Robby and team must field extra patients, including the victim of a parkour mishap.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: As patients continue to pour in, including a local prison inmate, Robby and Langdon must work together to save a beloved patient.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: As the team deals with a loss, Al-Hashimi and Robby continue to clash over the best course of treatment for a patient showing signs of malnutrition.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: While Dana tends to a sexual assault victim, Abbot helps an officer injured in the field, and Mohan attempts to keep her uninsured patient in the ER.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: In the wake of an IT shutdown, Princess must manage a completely analog ER. Al-Hashimi, Mohan, and King assess a woman with sudden blindness.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: After one of Javadi's patients slips through the cracks, Dana calls in an old friend with experience running a low-tech ER.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: After an incident at a nearby water park, several critical patients are rushed to the Pitt. Later, Al-Hashimi confronts Robby.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: While King struggles to cope with her sister's newfound independence, patients and staff are put on edge by an unexpected presence in the ER.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: After she steps up to defend her trainee, Dana clashes with Robby about her methods and his upcoming sabbatical.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: As the night shift begins, Mohan's AMA patient is brought back to the ER, Langdon doubts his place in the Pitt, and Robby gets Duke's results.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: After his bike takes a hit in the ambulance bay, Robby levels with Duke. A spinal cord injury forces Langdon to attempt a risky procedure.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: Al-Hashimi reveals details from her medical history, forcing Robby to face an ethical dilemma as he prepares to leave for his sabbatical.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

programme.title: Life of the Party
programme.desc: When her husband suddenly dumps her, longtime and dedicated housewife Deanna turns regret into reset by going back to college. Unfortunately, Deanna winds up at the same school as her less-than-thrilled daughter. Plunging headlong into the campus experience, the outspoken new student soon finds her true self while fully embracing all the fun, freedom and frat boys that she can handle.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Blew Up: A Looney Tunes Movie
programme.desc: Porky Pig and Daffy Duck become Earth's only hope when their antics at the local bubble-gum factory uncover a secret alien mind-control plot. Faced with cosmic odds, they must save their town and the world while not driving each other totally loony.

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

programme.title: Fake Famous
programme.desc: Exploring the industry of social media influencers with an innovative social experiment: three people in Los Angeles with relatively small social followings attempt to become famous influencers by purchasing fake followers and an army of bots.

programme.title: You Were My First Boyfriend
programme.desc: Filmmaker Cecilia Aldarondo revisits her 1990s adolescence, a generation after she thought she'd left it all behind.

programme.title: Dirty Driving: Thundercars of Indiana
programme.desc: In spite of hard economic times and high unemployment, high-speed racing continues to be an obsession for Americans.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs -- a working-class gamer, a former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive -- who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

programme.title: The Rover
programme.desc: In the near future, mankind's greed and excesses have pushed civilization to the breaking point. Society is in decline, and the rule of law has disintegrated. Hardened drifter Eric (Guy Pearce) wanders across this dangerous and desolate landscape. When thieves steal Eric's car -- and only remaining possession -- they leave behind Rey (Robert Pattinson), a wounded comrade. Eric forces Rey to help him hunt down the gang in an unrelenting quest to take back the one thing that matters to him.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: Previously thought to be extinct, a massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific. With time running out, a visionary oceanographer recruits rescue diver Jonas Taylor to save the crew and the sea itself from an unimaginable threat -- a 75-foot-long prehistoric shark known as the Megalodon.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: The Hole in the Ground
programme.desc: One night, Sarah's young son disappears into the woods behind their rural home. When he returns, he looks the same, but his behavior grows increasingly disturbing. Sarah begins to believe that the boy who returned may not be her son at all.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.title: The Smashing Machine
programme.desc: The true story of mixed martial arts and UFC fighter Mark Kerr, whose obsession with greatness made him a legend -- and nearly cost him everything.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: Alex vs. A-Rod
programme.desc: Told by Alex Rodriguez, this three-part documentary explores the demon he called A-Rod and the work he's done to become Alex once more.

programme.title: Alex vs. A-Rod
programme.desc: In 2013, a newspaper exposé once again links Alex Rodriguez to performance-enhancing drugs, triggering Major League Baseball's longest-ever PED suspension and a storm of public hostility.

programme.title: Alex vs. A-Rod
programme.desc: Alex becomes a huge superstar and soon transforms into one of baseball's history most controversial figures.

programme.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
programme.desc: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

programme.title: My Cousin Rachel
programme.desc: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

programme.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
programme.desc: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

programme.title: The Strangers
programme.desc: Kristen (Liv Tyler) and James (Scott Speedman) are expecting a relaxing weekend at a family vacation home, but their stay turns out to be anything but peaceful. First, a mysterious and dangerous woman arrives at the door while James is out on an errand. When he returns, he accidentally kills his friend Mike (Glenn Howerton), mistaking him for an intruder. And then real danger does show up -- in the form of three masked torturers, leaving Kristen and James struggling for survival.

programme.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
programme.desc: Plagued by a violent and recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle of death and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

programme.title: Undertone
programme.desc: The host of a popular paranormal podcast is sent hidden messages within anonymous recordings, unleashing a demonic presence that is impossible to escape.

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: Father Gabriele Amorth, chief exorcist of the Vatican, uncovers a centuries-old conspiracy while investigating a young boy's terrifying possession.

programme.title: Midsommar
programme.desc: A young American couple, their relationship foundering, travel to a Swedish midsummer festival where a seemingly pastoral paradise transforms into a sinister, dread-soaked nightmare as the locals reveal their terrifying agenda.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
programme.desc: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Animal pals Alex (Ben Stiller), Marty (Chris Rock), Melman (David Schwimmer) and Gloria (Jada Pinkett Smith) are still trying to make it back to New York's Central Park Zoo. programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: 2020 has been memorable for all the wrong reasons, so what better tonic than to take things back to the decadent 1920s! Chloe Sims and Diags have made plans for a vintage knees-up, but with COVID restrictions in play, they're splitting the guest list down the middle and throwing two rival gatherings - and the competition is on! With both determined to throw the best do, what's a little sabotage between friends, and with the opposing gatherings in full swing, will the besties manage to make it through the night without one another? Following Harry and Frankie's break-up, Chloe Brockett wasted no time in approaching Harry to check whether he was OK - now Frankie has heard that the chat was more flirtatious than friendly, and is devastated that Chloe would kick her while she's down. When the plot thickens further and Saff reveals that Chloe said she wants to get back with Harry, will it be the final straw for Frankie, and will tempers flare when Chloe stands her ground against Frankie?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. An Audrey Hepburn-inspired brunch leaves most of the women at odds, Mary and Meredith's friendship lands in a rocky place after a surprising conflict, Heather has lingering resentment over Palm Springs, Todd is disappointed in Bronwyn's behaviour, Angie makes an emotional confession to her dad, and Mary's concern for Robert Jr grows.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. The ladies head to wine country for Heather's fundraising event with Family Equality, Jenn has a court date to determine her financial future, the group navigate supporting Shannon and Alexis during a lawsuit deadline, and Shannon finds out about the video from the night of her DUI and confesses shocking details about her accident.

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Brand ambassador Isabel is going to be given five menus, each put together by a potential blind date. The five men behind the menus have all come up with a three course meal but Isabel will only be having dinner with three of them. She will choose her dates based on the menus she most likes the look of. But when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done, who will she want to see for seconds.

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. Heather and Whitney host a girls' camp to reunite the women, but fractures in the friend group only become more evident in the process - meanwhile, Meredith invites Mary to a gallery to work through their issues but things quickly go awry. programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. programme.desc: Crime drama series. Brandon Monkford proudly introduces artist Lance Auden at the launch of his new sculpture park - the guests head into the floodlit woods and Clemmy Staples is spooked by her boyfriend Brin Dunne before discovering Brandon's body arranged on Lance's centrepiece sculpture. Kam finds a broken locket near the body at the murder scene before Barnaby speaks with the family - Brandon's wife Alexandra is shocked, but son Fabian explains that the villagers were opposed to the park and that Brin had formed a group called VASP (Villagers Against the Sculpture Park). After the family deny recognising the locket, Lance claims he got on well with Brandon but fellow artist Simeon Rowling suggests that Brandon upset some artists and critic Daniel Fargo reveals Brandon received hate mail. As Barnaby and Nelson investigate, they have to get creative if they are to crack a case where art imitates death and everything has a deeper meaning.

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series based on HE Bates's eccentric Larkin family. The story opens with the arrival of Mr Charlton, a mild-mannered tax inspector who falls in love with Pop's daughter instead of checking Pop's non-existent accounts.

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Things don't quite go 'perfick' when Charley decides to play truant from his office at the Inland Revenue and goes strawberry picking with Mariette and the rest of the Larkin family, and it suddenly seems as though Charley's future is in doubt...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Troy have to solve a double murder when a feisty former socialite and a Casanova are found bludgeoned to death. However, the motives for the murders seem disparate, and there are several people who are suspected of involvement.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Joyce Barnaby's new watercolour class takes her to the village green in Midsomer Florey, her project - to paint pictures for a charity auction - is led by the flamboyant Barrett Filby, whose enthusiasm for his pupils' work is infectious if a little misplaced. Other members of the painters' circle include Ann Carter, the no-nonsense houseproud wife of Tony, a menace who is having an affair, Tessa Hawksley, the wife of alcoholic and soon-to-be redundant bank manager Colin, and Ruth Fairfax, a dowdy sixty-something who takes her painting very seriously. Meanwhile, Barnaby and Troy are busy with Operation Pondlife, a scheme to combat street crime in Midsomer County, when Ruth Fairfax's body is found by Joyce and prompts Barnaby and Troy to begin investigating. After learning that Ruth was not who she claimed to be, the investigation is conspicuously taken out of Barnaby's control - due to his wife's involvement as a prime witness - and given to the National Intelligence Squad.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The death of a young film star at the opening of a Satanic experience at his family's ancestral pile brings Barnaby and Troy to the feuding villages of Upper and Lower Warden - the Smythe-Websters are certainly exploiting the work of celebrated House of Satan author Ellis Bell, but is there more to his legacy?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The beautiful, historic watermill in Lower Blissingham is home to award-winning artisan baker Tom Larkton and his pastry chef wife Chrissie. Having fully restored the two-century-old family site into a sustainable, state-of-the-art organic business, the charismatic power couple seem to have it all. Tom’s wildly popular online vlogs have even turned him into a minor celebrity. However, not everyone is raising a glass to their success. The destination's booming popularity has sparked fierce resentment among struggling local business owners, and rumours of an upcoming expansion push tensions to a boiling point. When the envy escalates into deadly sabotage, DCI John Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter are called in to investigate. With livelihoods on the line, the duo must discover who is willing to kill to protect their turf before the bakery's empire completely crumbles.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. When respected surgeon Dan Marsden is shot dead days before his retirement and his teenage daughters Mira and Karen are abducted, DCI Vera Stanhope, DS Joe Ashworth and DC Kenny Lockhart must race against time to track down the killer and save the sisters. As newcomer DC Barry Kelman joins the team, it is not long before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A body is found in the canals of Oxford and the only clue to its identity points to a connection with one of the colleges - there is just one question for Morse... which of the highly respected contenders for a prestigious post is the killer?

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. British bot Beta tries to bash itself through the impenetrable armour of Black Dragon - the Brazilian bot that's never been knocked out - fellow UK brawler Cobalt aims to continue its strong run through the qualifying rounds, and sparks fly as a bot dies in a shocking Main Event featuring a ferocious clash of titans.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur is forced to broadcast his first-ever commercial on pirate radio when a rival car dealer tries to put him out of business with a nightmare test drive.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. When Thomas has an accident while ski-surfing on Independence Day and ends up stranded miles out at sea, he ends up reliving the pain and trauma of his father's death during the Korean War.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas searches for a missing girl, but his inquiries are complicated by fellow detective Luther Gillis, who muscles in on the case and proves to have a personal interest in seeing it resolved.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: The very first episode of the classic detective series. New York police lieutenant James Dempsey kills his corrupt partner Joey and has to lay low until the case can be further investigated - his superior O'Grady sends Dempsey to London in England as part of an exchange of officers. Chief Superintendent Spikings, the head of SI-10, is not too pleased to have a Yank forced onto his department, so he decides to couple Dempsey with his complete opposite in the form of Sergeant Harriet 'Harry' Makepeace - an upper-class English rose - on a case involving a mysterious shipment of caviar.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. The Champions are enlisted to help when a mysterious plane destroys a US naval aircraft.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The second Slugfest finishes as one bot survives and proceeds to the Golden Bolt tournament to face a star-studded international line-up including seventh series world champion SawBlaze and Giant Nut winner and Golden Bolt holder End Game.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Rick agrees to help his boyhood friend Waldo Norris, who claims that he's trying to recover a priceless stolen china figurine - however, Rick little suspects that the entire story is an elaborate insurance fraud.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas reluctantly agrees to chaperone Rick's naive convent-schooled sister Wendy as she enjoys a night on the town in Honolulu, but he doesn't count on murder complicating matters...

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: When a Haul Road legend dies, Ray leads the trucker's son to scatter his ashes on Atigun. But the son's blunders on the Dalton could get them killed before they make it. Lisa gets her biggest break yet when she's assigned to push-truck a monster load to Prudhoe. Alex discovers Alaskan gold, but is later busted by the DOT for violations.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson returns to the host's chair as Stephen Fry and Jeanette Kwakye take to the hot seat, but have either got what it takes to top the money ladder and win one million pounds for their chosen charity?

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: The show for motorcycle enthusiasts returns with regular presenter and biking fanatic Henry Cole joining the White Helmets display team to jump through a wall of fire, sampling the delights of Enduro riding, travelling to the classic bike show in Stafford and beginning to customise a bike to enter into the Brighton Custom Show.

programme.title: Berlin Station
programme.desc: Daniel and Hector are being hunted by Vassily Krik. They manage to find shelter in a green house in the woods where a well-kept secret will be revealed...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas befriends two elderly sisters involved in a hit-and-run accident outside a store where he is working undercover to catch a gang of crooks - he then helps to save them from homelessness.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Higgins sends an anonymous love letter to an English duchess who is visiting Hawaii, but she jumps to the conclusion that Thomas is the true author and congratulates herself on having attracted such a handsome suitor.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: Another adventure with the New York police officer and the English policewoman. When a robbery and a murder take place in a London casino, Dempsey and Makepeace become involved in the search for a girl who wears a rare antique necklace - and a conspiracy of desperate men to boot.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Harry arranges for a secret society to hold a meeting at Woodcote Park, and Ken is asked to follow and watch a client's wife.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. Richard infiltrates a mysterious agency in order to investigate a series of assassinations of world leaders.

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Drama series about CS Forester's famous seafaring hero. With the war with France having reached a stalemate, the Admiralty endorses a daring plan to overthrow the Republican government that finds the newly-promoted Lieutenant Hornblower on French soil - there he encounters both danger and an unexpected romance.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers - Deadliest Roads
programme.desc: Alabama trucker Dave Redmon stares down the notorious Freefall Freeway in a truck that is in horrible need of repair. Roadside maintenance costs him valuable time and he must face driving the roads with terrifying drop-offs at night or risk being late with his very first load.
